variants.title: Donaldson P761045 Breather, Hydraulic Cylindrical | Replaces the Mahle 852519MIC
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P761045 Breather, Hydraulic Cylindrical | Replaces the Mahle 852519MIC
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P761045 Breather, Hydraulic Cylindrical is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 85.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 44.0 mm, Length: 60.0 mm, Seal Material: Plastisol, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Seal: Plastisol

variants.title: Mann Filter C 8005 Air Filter | Replaces the Mahle 852519MIC
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 8005 Air Filter | Replaces the Mahle 852519MIC
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 85.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 44.0 mm, Length: 60.0 mm, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Seal: Plastisol, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.title: Filtrec B130C10 Filter | Replaces the Mahle 852519MIC
variants.option1Value: Filtrec B130C10 Filter | Replaces the Mahle 852519MIC
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec B130C10. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the B130C10 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
